# Bobby Kenner

> Software designer working on design systems, identity, and privacy. Previously at Superhuman, Grammarly, and Grubhub.

Bobby Kenner is a software designer based in the New York area. His portfolio is at https://bobby.md.

## Work

Six case studies, each describing a shipped product or design initiative:

- **Cookbook (Grubhub)** — one design system unifying three brands and every platform.
- **Grammarly Design System** — making an invisible system accessible to the organization.
- **SYNTHIA (Superhuman)** — synthetic user evaluation surfaced wherever designers work.
- **Privacy as a platform (Grammarly)** — consent, control, and enterprise data governance at 40M users.
- **Identity (Superhuman)** — one identity layer for three products in motion. id.superhuman.com.
- **Project Sunburst (Grubhub)** — the year Grubhub caught up on mobile.
